title: TC4 wand focus behavior parity batch

fire.adapter: beam/ray fire damage, ignition, block fire placement

frost.adapter: ray frost damage, slow, extinguish, snow/ice placement

shock.original_cost: AIR 25; chain AIR 40 + WATER 10; earth AIR 75 + EARTH 25
shock.adapter: v11.62.17 direct lightning, recursive nearest-target chain and redirectable Earth Shock projectile with BlockAiry-meta-10 electric ground adapter
upgrades_unresolved: legacy FXLightningBolt geometry is represented through the modern synchronized beam/particle bridge

equal_trade.adapter: original-style connected swap / architect plane selection using wand areax/areay/areaz/aread and picked block NBT; offhand remains Forge 1.19.2 fallback adapter until original pick UI is restored

primal.original_cost: stable 200 ms random 50..250 of each primal aspect
primal.adapter: v11.62.17 TC4PrimalOrbEntity with original speed/gravity, deterministic wandering, squared-distance seeker steering, water explosion and rare node/taint branches
upgrades_unresolved: runtime biome mutation for taint splosion; exact legacy GL ray geometry

stage177_update.equal_trade_adapter: replaced Stage171 3x3 planar placeholder with original WandManager/IArchitect area NBT and connected-swap traversal in FocusArchitectRuntime
stage177_update.primal_adapter: Stage178 moved primal impact behavior into TC4PrimalOrbEntity and removed Stage171 placeholder ray effect methods
stage177_update.stage_v11_62_17: Shock and Primal temporary behaviors were replaced by original-source-derived 1.19.2 adapters; no weakness effect or invented primal aspect/color remains.
